title: Happy New Year 2026
subtext: Wishing you joy, health, and prosperity in the new year
promptHints: spectacular aerial view of luxury residential towers at midnight, cascading golden fireworks bursting above rooftops, balconies glowing with warm celebration lights, infinity pool reflecting pyrotechnic sky below, champagne bubble bokeh in extreme foreground, deep midnight blue atmosphere fading to warm amber horizon, upper portion dynamic and spectacular with fireworks, lower third in dense darkness

title: Happy Republic Day
subtext: Celebrating the spirit of our great nation
promptHints: majestic tricolour abstract composition, sweeping ribbons of saffron white and deep green caught mid-flow against midnight navy canvas, Ashoka wheel motif dissolving into golden light particles, powerful shafts of amber light cutting through atmospheric mist, ceremonial grandeur, monumental and patriotic, lower third in deep patriotic navy shadow

title: Happy Valentine's Day
promptHints: romantic bokeh dreamscape of luminous rose-gold heart shapes at varying depths of focus, fresh red rose petals falling in slow motion against deep crimson velvet atmosphere, delicate champagne bubble trails rising upward, radiant soft-focus centre glow, intimate luxury perfume advertisement aesthetic, lower third in velvety deep rose darkness

title: Happy Holi
subtext: May your life be filled with vibrant colours
promptHints: high-speed photography freeze of vibrant gulal powder explosion, vivid clouds of magenta pink turquoise and golden yellow erupting outward against black background, particles catching dramatic rim backlight creating glowing halos, joyful kinetic chaos frozen in time, fine coloured powder texture in extreme foreground bokeh, lower third emerging from darkness

title: Happy Women's Day
subtext: Celebrating the strength and spirit of every woman
promptHints: abstract female empowerment composition, flowing purple and gold silk ribbons swirling upward like flames, blooming purple lotus flowers emerging from dark reflective water surface, divine feminine energy radiating warmth, soft golden spotlight from above, inspirational editorial photography aesthetic, lower third in calm deep violet shadow

title: Happy Independence Day
subtext: Jai Hind! Proud to be Indian
promptHints: epic wide-angle dramatic sky at sunset, abstract saffron white and green light ribbons soaring upward like a flag unfurling against massive cloudscape, golden rays of light piercing through towering cumulonimbus clouds, tricolour particles dissolving into atmosphere, powerful patriotic energy, lower third in deep shadow

title: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi
subtext: May Lord Ganesha bless your home with wisdom and prosperity
promptHints: cascading marigold flowers in deep orange saffron and gold filling frame top to bottom, intricate brass and copper decorative temple elements catching warm ceremonial light, golden glitter particles suspended in amber atmosphere, banana leaf patterns and coconut motifs in abstract composition, no deity imagery, warm devotional atmosphere, lower third in rich amber shadow

title: Happy Navratri
subtext: Celebrate the divine spirit of Navratri with joy
promptHints: circular garba dance energy captured as spiralling light trails of red orange and gold, traditional mirror-work chaniya choli fabric fragments in blurred rotation, ghungroo ankle bells scattering light points outward, deep crimson atmosphere with copper and gold accents, abstract whirlpool composition radiating outward, dramatic festive energy, lower third in deep burgundy shadow

title: Happy Dussehra
subtext: Triumph of good over evil — wishing you victory in all endeavours
promptHints: dramatic twilight sky with abstract golden arrow of divine light piercing through dark storm clouds, marigold orange and deep crimson horizon glowing, triumphant rays of warm light breaking through heavy clouds symbolising victory, symbolic power and righteousness, epic cinematic sky composition, lower third in deep shadow

title: Happy Diwali
subtext: May your home shine with joy and prosperity
promptHints: luxury residential community courtyard at Diwali night, ornate clay diyas arranged in intricate rangoli spiral patterns on stone terrace, warm amber glow from thousands of oil lamp flames, golden sparklers arcing overhead leaving light trails, atmospheric smoke haze catching the golden light, marigold garland silhouettes framing the scene, lower third in rich maroon darkness

title: Happy Bhai Dooj
subtext: Celebrating the beautiful bond of siblings
promptHints: intimate warm home celebration aesthetic, brass diya with dancing flame in sharp foreground focus, marigold petals and vermillion tikka scattered in dreamy bokeh background, warm amber home lighting creating golden haze, traditional ritual warmth and familial love, shallow depth of field, lower third in deep warm amber shadow

title: Merry Christmas
subtext: May the joy of Christmas fill your home and heart
promptHints: cosy festive apartment balcony at night, cascade of warm fairy lights blurred in soft focus above, snowflakes drifting through cold night air as luminous bokeh circles, fresh evergreen pine branch with red berries in close foreground, deep forest green and rich burgundy atmosphere, warm indoor golden glow contrasting cold blue night, lower third in deep midnight green shadow

title: World Blood Donor Day
promptHints: minimalist medical compassion visual, single luminous red sphere glowing softly against clean white environment, gentle warm light rays emanating outward from the sphere, clean clinical aesthetic balanced with human warmth and care, subtle red gradient fading to white, lifesaving purity and hope, lower third in clean white-to-pale-red gradient

title: International Yoga Day
promptHints: serene pre-dawn mountain landscape at first light, perfect golden sun disc cresting misty mountain peaks, single lotus flower floating on glass-still water surface with perfect reflection, pastel coral lavender and gold dawn sky gradients, morning mist drifting between mountain folds, absolute tranquility and balance, lower third in cool deep indigo water reflection

title: World Environment Day
subtext: Together for a greener, cleaner planet
promptHints: lush tropical forest cathedral canopy viewed from forest floor looking up, morning sun filtering through layers of emerald leaves in dramatic god rays, ancient tree trunks disappearing into mist above, vivid spectrum of greens from deep forest shadow to bright lime leaf, dewdrops on leaves catching sunlight like scattered diamonds, lower third in deep forest shadow

title: Happy Teacher's Day
subtext: Honouring the guides who shape our future
promptHints: warm golden library interior bathed in afternoon light, soft sunbeams through tall dusty windows casting long rectangles of light on leather-bound stacked books, loose pages caught mid-flutter in the light beams, deep mahogany and amber colour palette, dust motes floating in golden air, knowledge and wisdom atmosphere, lower third in rich dark wood shadow

title: Eid Mubarak
subtext: May this Eid bring joy, peace, and blessings to your home
promptHints: ornate Islamic architecture bathed in twilight, intricately patterned Arabesque geometric lattice glowing against deep teal and midnight blue sky, golden crescent moon and single star suspended above, hanging ornate brass Moroccan lanterns casting intricate warm amber patterns on ground, gold dust particles floating in air, opulent and elegant atmosphere, lower third in deep teal night shadow

title: Happy Pongal
subtext: May the harvest bring abundance and happiness
promptHints: traditional South Indian Pongal harvest celebration, terracotta clay pot with fresh sugarcane stalks and marigold garlands overflowing in foreground, intricate white kolam rangoli geometric patterns on deep red ochre earth ground, warm golden harvest sunlight bathing the scene, banana leaves and green coconuts as natural frame, joyful abundance and tradition, lower third in earthy terracotta shadow
